name: clean
description: Low-risk docs + helper change; all agents pass, aggregate risk well under threshold.

pr.title: Add formatDuration helper and document it
pr.author: sam
pr.description: Adds a pure formatDuration(ms) helper and a short usage note in the README. No behavioural change to existing call sites.

risk-scoring.summary: Small, isolated, pure-function addition with documentation; minimal scope and no sensitive surface.

semantic-review.summary: Implementation matches the stated intent: a formatting helper plus a doc note.
semantic-review.intentSummary: Add and document a duration formatting helper.

security-review.summary: No secrets, no injection surface, no auth changes.
